name: one-page-marketing
description: Build a complete marketing plan covering the full customer journey from stranger to raving fan. Use when the user mentions "marketing plan", "target market", "USP", "lead nurture", "customer lifetime value", "referral program", "marketing strategy", or "PVP Index". Also trigger when building a marketing plan from scratch, choosing acquisition channels, or designing end-to-end customer lifecycle campaigns.
